work_item.description: ADR: adopt eventcore 0.9 + eventcore-fs (git-mergeable JSONL) as cfk's single event store. Supersedes ADR 0008 (deferred eventcore migration), amends ADR 0009 concurrency rationale, and supersedes the planned snapshot ADR (c57429dc) since eventcore-fs resolves replay via read-time linearization. Eliminates SQLite, the operational-cache/export duality, and the reconciliation bug-class. Drafted in docs/decisions/0010-eventcore-fs-event-store.md.
